headline: PROTECT QUALITY ALL THE WAY
subheading: Master GDP, the cold chain and data integrity before the MHRA inspects your supply chain.
flux_prompt: A sophisticated clinical-luxury abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical cold-chain distribution and quality assurance, an elegant network of luminous connected nodes and flowing supply-chain pathways tracing an unbroken journey across the frame, stylised temperature-controlled shipping modules and frosted refrigerated containers rendered as sleek geometric forms with delicate condensation glow, a refined continuous temperature-monitoring waveform and subtle data-logger pulse lines weaving through the scene, faint protective shield motifs and an unbroken chain-link rhythm suggesting traceability and integrity, deep navy background with cool teal and cyan luminosity, a subtle fresh green accent glow signalling a safe in-range reading, immaculate premium surfaces, soft volumetric light, shallow depth of field, calm and authoritative high-end pharmaceutical aesthetic, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
